basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rajkot Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 22 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rajkot (AIIMS Rajkot)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rajkot (AIIMS Rajkot) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 22 Junior Resident (Non-Academic) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official AIIMS Rajkot website. The last date to submit the application form is 19-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years. Age Relaxation: OBC-NCL: 3 years, SC/ST: 5 years, PwBD: 10 years (with conditions).

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS from NMC recognized Institute / Medical College, Compulsory rotatory internship completion certificate
qualification.details: MBBS from NMC recognized Institute / Medical College. Compulsory rotatory internship completion certificate.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Rajkot to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Rajkot Junior Resident (Non-Academic) posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the AIIMS Rajkot Junior Resident (Non-Academic) recruitment is 19th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Resident (Non-Academic) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 22 vacancies announced for the Junior Resident (Non-Academic) position at AIIMS Rajkot.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from an NMC recognized Institute/Medical College and a compulsory rotatory internship completion certificate.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Junior Resident (Non-Academic) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will be paid as per Level-10 of the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC) along with applicable allowances, including Non-Practicing Allowance (NPA).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: General and OBC candidates are required to pay an application fee of Rs. 1000 plus 18% GST, totaling Rs. 1180.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any application fees for SC/ST and Women candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for candidates belonging to the SC/ST category and for Women candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the AIIMS Rajkot Junior Resident (Non-Academic) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will include a Written Test, followed by Document Verification and an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the AIIMS Rajkot Junior Resident (Non-Academic) posts?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply online through the official website of AIIMS Rajkot on or before the last date of application.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the links to the official notification and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article.
